raw_cv_text:
Friedrich Collins
+44 7911 523 847 | Email: friedrich.collins@outlook.com | LinkedIn: friedrich-collins | GitHub: FriedrichCollins |
https://friedrichcollins.dev
EDUCATION
University of Cambridge | MSc Computer Science (Specialization: Cybersecurity) 2019 - 2020
Completed dissertation on Zero-Trust Architecture implementation in distributed systems, achieving distinction grade
with 78% average
Led weekly security research seminars for 30+ postgraduate students covering threat modeling and cryptographic
protocols
Georgia Institute of Technology | BS Computer Science (Minor in Information Security) 2015 - 2019
Graduated summa cum laude with 3.88 GPA; recipient of Cybersecurity Excellence Award
Co-founded Georgia Tech Ethical Hacking Club, growing membership to 150+ students within 18 months
EXPERIENCE
Cloudflare | Security Engineer II Jun 2022 - Present
Architected and deployed a new API rate-limiting module that reduced DDoS attack surface by 34%, protecting 2M+
customer domains
Designed automated vulnerability scanning pipeline integrating SAST/DAST tools, reducing security review time from 4
hours to 18 minutes per release
Responded to 47 critical security incidents, maintaining 99.2% MTTR (mean time to response) and preventing $2.3M in
potential data exposure
Stripe | Senior Security Analyst Mar 2021 - May 2022
Led penetration testing program across 8 microservices, identifying and remediating 156 vulnerabilities before
production, representing 67% reduction in security debt
Implemented OAuth 2.0 and JWT token validation framework processing 450K+ authentication requests daily with zero
compromise incidents
Mentored 3 junior security analysts, resulting in 2 promotions and 40% improvement in team incident resolution
efficiency
Palantir Technologies | Security Operations Analyst Aug 2020 - Feb 2021
Developed Python-based log aggregation tool correlating events from 12 security tools, reducing SIEM query time from 8
hours to 12 minutes
Conducted security compliance audits achieving SOC 2 Type II certification with 98.4% control effectiveness score
Configured and maintained intrusion detection system detecting 89 suspicious network patterns monthly with 92% true
positive rate
PROJECTS
CryptVault - Zero-Trust Secret Management | Go, gRPC, HashiCorp Vault, Docker, Kubernetes Jan 2023 - Jun 2023
Built distributed secret management platform using zero-trust principles, supporting 50K secrets with 99.99% availability
and AES-256 encryption
Reduced secret rotation time from 45 minutes to 2 minutes, eliminating manual operational overhead for 200+ developers
across 15 teams
ThreatMapper - Continuous Vulnerability Intelligence | Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Shodan Sep 2022 - Dec 2022
API, Docker
Engineered real-time threat intelligence aggregator scanning 45+ public vulnerability databases, generating 78%
reduction in vulnerability discovery time
Deployed alert system notifying 12 teams of critical CVE matches within 90 seconds, preventing 3 security incidents
SecAudit - Automated Compliance Framework | Terraform, Python, AWS IAM, GitHub Actions, Apr 2022 - Aug 2022
CloudFormation
Created Infrastructure-as-Code compliance checking tool validating 156 security policies across 40+ AWS accounts
monthly
Automated compliance reporting reducing manual audit work by 88%, saving 120 hours of manual labor quarterly
EncryptedLog - SIEM Log Encryption Suite | Java, Spring Boot, ELK Stack, GPG, Kubernetes Nov 2021 - Mar 2022
Developed end-to-end encrypted logging system processing 2.1M log events daily while maintaining 99.97% uptime
Reduced log analysis performance overhead by 12% through optimized encryption algorithms, enabling faster threat
detection
EXTRACURRICULAR
OWASP (Open Web Application Security Project) | Core Team Member & Chapter Lead 2021 - Present
Organized 24 security workshops reaching 680+ professionals, covering API security, threat modeling, and secure coding
practices
Maintained OWASP Top 10 educational resources repository with 4.2K GitHub stars and 89K monthly downloads
DEF CON Security Conference | Speaker & Capture The Flag (CTF) Judge 2022 - 2023
Delivered keynote on 'Zero-Trust Architecture in Cloud Environments' to 1,200+ security professionals at DEF CON 31
Designed and judged CTF challenges for 420 participants, with 94% participant satisfaction rating
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python, Go, Java, Bash, SQL, JavaScript
Technologies – Kubernetes, Docker, AWS (IAM, CloudTrail, Security Hub), Azure, GCP, Terraform, SIEM (Splunk, ELK),
Vault, OAuth 2.0, TLS/SSL, GPG
Tools – Burp Suite, Metasploit, Wireshark, Nessus, Snort, OWASP ZAP, Git, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Terraform, Shodan
